positive: A stunning minimalist abstract design featuring a stylized Bengal tiger paw print interwoven with neon tropical flowers and geometric lines. The composition should be highly contrasted, with deep indigo and teal backgrounds contrasting sharply with vibrant oranges, bright pinks, and electric yellow accents. The tiger motif should be bold and symmetrical, suitable for a central apparel print. Style: Modern Pop Art meets Clean Vector Illustration. Lighting: Flat, even studio lighting. Composition: Centered, high contrast silhouette work. Print Details: Clean lines, scalable vector feel, limited color palette, suitable for single-color printing on dark fabric.
